rationale: Review 1's diagnosis (mapValue introduces nonstandard category terminology with no AlgHom/WithConv precedent except one unrelated Valuative case, while Mathlib uses map* for exactly this post-composition pattern) is correct per the diff's definition/docstring at lines 145-200 and would yield a meaningfully better naming choice (map/postcomp/etc.); Review 2's compRight alternative is a weaker fit for a lifted MonoidHom and risks confusion with LinearMap.compRight, so acting on it produces an inferior result.
